data.title: Trump To Unveil Next Crypto Policy Steps Thursday; Tesla Recalls 46,000 Cybertrucks Over Safety Issue With Exterior Panel; Amazon Expands Auto Platform To 68 Markets, Enters Used Car Space – Top Headlines While The U.S. Slept
Top Analyst Urges Elon Musk To Do These 2 Things To Restore Investor Confidence In Tesla
data.description: Wedbush analyst Dan Ives has urged for sweeping changes at Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) in response to the ongoing decline in the company's share price.

data.title: Kraken To Buy NinjaTrader For $1.5 Billion, Entering US Crypto Futures Market In 2025
data.description: Kraken to acquire NinjaTrader for $1.5 billion, expanding its offerings beyond digital assets into traditional futures trading and entering the U.S. crypto futures market with regulatory backing.

data.title: Is M&A Coming For DouYu? Is Tencent Interested?
data.description: With renewed investor expectations for DouYu's privatization or acquisition, is Tencent, a 38% stakeholder in DouYu, interested?

data.title: XRP Soars 7% On SEC Win, Outperforms Bitcoin, Ethereum
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is up 8.3% over the last seven days, outperforming other leading cryptocurrencies.
